hooks.command: c=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // .tool_input.query // empty'); if [ -z "$c" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$c" | grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*node[[:space:]]+db-snapshot\.js'; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$c" | grep -Eqi '(node[[:space:]]+(seed-|fetch-results)|pg\.query.*(INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE|ALTER|DROP|CREATE|TRUNCATE)|^[[:space:]]*(INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE|ALTER|DROP|CREATE|TRUNCATE))'; then mkdir -p .claude && node db-snapshot.js > .claude/.snapshot-before.txt 2>/dev/null || true; fi; exit 0

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | grep -q '^supabase/functions/' && echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️  Edge Function changed — remember: supabase functions deploy <name>"}' || true

c=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // .tool_input.query // empty'); if [ -z "$c" ] || [ ! -f .claude/.snapshot-before.txt ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$c" | grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*node[[:space:]]+db-snapshot\.js'; then exit 0; fi; node db-snapshot.js > .claude/.snapshot-after.txt 2>/dev/null || true; d=$(diff .claude/.snapshot-before.txt .claude/.snapshot-after.txt | head -40); if [ -n "$d" ]; then printf '%s\n' "$d" | jq -Rs '{systemMessage: ("DB snapshot diff after this command:\n" + .)}'; else echo '{"systemMessage":"DB snapshot: no row/constraint changes."}'; fi; rm -f .claude/.snapshot-before.txt .claude/.snapshot-after.txt; exit 0
